title: Taylor's Eye Witness Maple 4 Piece 18.5cm Dessert Fork Set with Fine Polished Finish - Rust Resistant 430 Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery. Perfect for Cakes, Pastries, Fruits & More. 5 Year Guarantee
features: PREMIUM-GRADE 430 STAINLESS STEEL DESSERT FORKS – Flimsy forks bend under pressure, rust over time, & lose their durability with frequent use. Taylor's Eye Witness dessert forks are built differently! They are forged from high-quality 430 stainless steel, a durable material recognised for its ferritic microstructure, which provides superior resistance to corrosion, staining, & everyday wear. With a precise handle gauge for added rigidity, they resist bending & deformation under normal use.

FINE MIRROR-POLISHED FINISH FOR A SLEEK, ELEGANT LOOK – Standard spoons develop scratches, water stains, & dull surfaces that degrade your dining experience. These tablespoons feature a fine polished finish, providing a naturally smooth, non-porous surface that is resistant to micro-scratches & discolouration. And they won’t look out of place at even the most sophisticated dinner parties. Unlike low-quality cutlery, these spoons retain their lustre even after repeated use & washing.

PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY DINING, SERVING, AND COOKING – Using spoons that are too small for serving or too large for comfortable use can be inconvenient. Not with our tablespoons! Combining practicality & style in equal measure, their 20cm length ensures optimal reach—whether for eating, portioning, or stirring—while the deep-set, elliptical bowl maximises scooping efficiency for liquids, grains, & semi-solid foods. Plus, its ergonomic handle provides a stable, balanced grip & precise control.

EASY TO CLEAN AND 100% DISHWASHER SAFE – Some spoons trap food particles, stain easily, or require excessive scrubbing to clean properly. But Taylor's Eye Witness tablespoons feature a smooth, non-reactive stainless steel surface that prevents food from sticking & ensures effortless cleaning. Fully dishwasher-safe, they withstand high temperatures & repeated wash cycles without dulling or corroding. Plus, its design minimises crevices where residue can accumulate, maintaining optimal hygiene.

BUILT TO LAST, BACKED BY A 5-YEAR GUARANTEE – Many spoons lose their shape, break, or show signs of wear within months. But not ours. Our tablespoons are constructed to maintain long-term performance. Here at Taylor's Eye Witness, we’re so confident in the strength & quality of our product that any item found compromised will be replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. We've been making kitchen tools for over 150 years & pride ourselves on the reliability of our products.
description: Flimsy Forks Ruining Your Desserts? Not Anymore! There’s nothing worse than digging into a delicious slice of cake or a perfectly baked pastry, only for your fork to feel weak, bendy, or uncomfortable in your hand. Some forks are too sharp and awkward, while others lack the right balance—making dessert more frustrating than enjoyable. If you’ve ever struggled with cheap, poorly made forks, you’ll appreciate the difference with the Maple Set of 4 Dessert Forks by Taylor’s Eye Witness. Strong, Stylish, and Built to Last Crafted from premium 430 stainless steel , these Maple Dessert Forks won’t bend, tarnish, or lose their shape over time. The thoughtfully designed handles provide a comfortable grip , making them perfect for everything from fluffy cakes to rich cheesecakes. Their fine mirror-polished finish adds a touch of elegance to your table while resisting stains and watermarks, keeping them looking pristine meal after meal. Designed by Taylor’s Eye Witness, a renowned British brand with over 150 years of cutlery craftsmanship, these forks bring superior quality that elevates even the simplest desserts. Effortless Cleaning, Long-Lasting Quality Forget forks that require endless scrubbing or lose their shine after a few washes. These dessert forks are 100% dishwasher safe , ensuring effortless cleanup—no matter how sticky or crumbly your treat was. Their stainless steel construction keeps them rust-free and spotless with minimal maintenance. Plus, with a 5-year guarantee , you can trust that these forks are made for long-term use, making them a reliable addition to your cutlery collection. Experience the Difference in Every Bite Don’t let flimsy cutlery ruin your favourite desserts. With the Maple Set of 4 Dessert Forks, you get the perfect balance of strength, style, and precision—designed to make every bite effortless and enjoyable.
